commands: docker compose exec postgres psql (count and migration queries)
docker compose stop api postgres; docker compose up (persistence test)
alembic upgrade head; downgrade base; upgrade head (disposable database)
docker stop api; docker start agent; docker start api (spool recovery test)

Nginx, TLS, Redis, workers, monitoring, Kubernetes, and AI are later phases.
